rulings.Case Title: HONG HAO WANG VS. ALICE TOY
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday May 16, 2018, line 3 To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden and show likelihood of prevailing on the merits or irreparable harms, which may not be compensated by money damages. = (501/REQ)
